steps.title: Identify profit equation structure
steps.content:
Profit = Revenue - Fixed Cost.
$$18000 = 3.50x - 5250$$ shows profit (18000) equals 3.50x minus 5250, so 3.50x is the revenue.

steps.title: Interpret the term 3.50x
steps.content:
Since revenue equals price per phone stand times number sold, the coefficient 3.50 has units dollars per phone stand. Therefore $$3.50x$$ is the monthly sales revenue from selling $$x$$ phone stands.
That confirms A is correct.
